data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the next-eligible-delivery timestamp.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the next-eligible-delivery timestamp to enforce cool-down, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this timestamp, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm its existence or functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the presence or functionality of the next-eligible-delivery timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the next-eligible-delivery timestamp requirement.
